LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE AUG-09-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF MIKE PASINI'S MOTION FOR DETERMINATION OF PREVAILING PARTY AND AWARD OF ATTORNEY FEES, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR DEFENDANT'S NONCOMPLIANCE WITH LOCAL RULE 2.7(B) (COURTESY COPIES). MOTION MAY BE RE-SET FOR A MON.-THUR. AFTER OCTOBER 24. DEFENDANT'S PAPERS SHALL BEAR NEW HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF COMPLIED WITH RULE 2.7(B) AND NEED NOT RE-FILE HIS PAPERS. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MIKE PASINI'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER VERIFIED RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES NOS 104.1 AND 112.1 IS GRANTED. WITHIN FIVE CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER DEFENDANT MUST SERVE PLAINTIFF WITH VERIFIED RESPONSES TO THESE TWO FORM INTERROGATORIES. THE COURT WILL IMPOSE NO MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST EITHER PARTY. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS ADOPTED RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT FOR APPROVAL AS TO FORM AND DELIVER A COPY IN WORD FORM TO THE COURT VIA EMAIL AT RRENNEPAR85@GMAIL.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/JPT)
